name: Hirasol - Bot Author's Aid
description:
Hirasol is a sunflower 🌻

It's also your writing aid to make bots, lorebooks and scenarios ♪ So if you're looking for an AI assistant with directives to aid you in building your bots, lorebooks, scenario, world/lore... you could give this a try.

It's not as strong as bot-generator types amongst the many 💁 Assistants bots but it will work side-by-side with you, the Bot Author. It's not meant to generate bots; it's meant to help you build; you're still the author, the architect and the carpenter... this bot is just a toolbox if you catch my drift.

Please do leave a comment if you like my work. I would greatly appreciate it ♪

This is a late Christmas gift to my friends who enjoy writing bots Janitor AI 🎁
creator: Hirasol
